hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$cmd" in *"git commit"*) b=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$b" = "main" ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"You are on main. Create a feature branch first (git switch -c <branch-name>), then commit there."}}'; fi;; esac
